summary: Completed frontend testing of StatMoose baseball tracker enhancements. 10/11 features verified working. Found 1 critical bug: scoreboard score not updating on hits (home runs, singles, doubles, triples) due to race condition in handleInPlayResult overwriting advanceRunners score updates.

ui_bugs.issue: Scoreboard score not updating on hits (home run, single, double, triple). The final setGame call at lines 1659-1668 overwrites the score updated by advanceRunners with old values (newHomeScore/newAwayScore initialized at lines 1498-1499).
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: In handleInPlayResult, for hit types (single, double, triple, home_run), don't overwrite home_score/away_score in the final setGame call. Either: 1) Remove home_score/away_score from the final setGame for these cases, or 2) Use a functional update to read the current state after advanceRunners completes.

action_items: FIX: In BaseballLiveGame.jsx handleInPlayResult (lines 1659-1668), the final setGame call overwrites score updates from advanceRunners. For hit types (single, double, triple, home_run), the home_score and away_score should not be overwritten with the old values.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: handleInPlayResult lines 1498-1499 initialize newHomeScore/newAwayScore from old game state, then advanceRunners updates the score, but lines 1664-1665 overwrite with old values
Team Stats R column shows correct runs (uses player stats), but Scoreboard shows 0-0 (uses game.home_score/away_score)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features except scoreboard score update are working. The bug is in handleInPlayResult - it overwrites advanceRunners score updates. After fix, verify scoreboard shows correct score after home runs with runners on base.

base_runner_advancement_single.notes: Base advancement works correctly (batter to 1st, runners advance). BUT scoreboard score not updating due to bug.

base_runner_advancement_double.notes: Base advancement works correctly (batter to 2nd, runner on 1st to 3rd). BUT scoreboard score not updating due to bug.

base_runner_advancement_home_run.notes: Bases cleared correctly after home run. BUT scoreboard shows 0-0 instead of 3 runs (2 runners + batter). Team Stats R column shows correct value.

clickable_base_runners_modal.notes: Clicking runner on base opens modal with runner number and current base info.

base_runner_modal_steal_base.notes: Steal Base button advances runner one base and logs 'Stolen base by #X (Xst to Xnd)' in play-by-play.

base_runner_modal_caught_stealing.notes: Caught Stealing adds out, removes runner from base, logs 'Caught stealing - #X out at Xnd' in play-by-play.

base_runner_modal_picked_off.notes: Picked Off option visible in modal with correct styling.

base_runner_modal_move_runner.notes: Move Runner To section shows available bases (2nd Base, 3rd Base when on 1st).

outfielders_visible.notes: LF (top:18%, left:20%), CF (top:10%, left:50%), RF (top:18%, left:80%) all visible on field image.

team_stats_columns.notes: Team Stats table shows R, H, E, SO, BB columns. Values update correctly in real-time.

bso_indicators_centered.notes: B/S/O indicators centered next to inning in scoreboard. B (green), S (red), O (yellow) dots visible.

walk_forces_runners.notes: Walk puts batter on 1st and forces other runners. BB stat updates in Team Stats.

playwright_test_results.all_9_fielders_visible: PASS - P, C, 1B, 2B, 3B, SS, LF, CF, RF
playwright_test_results.walk_creates_runner: PASS - Runner appears on 1st base after 4 balls
playwright_test_results.runner_modal_opens: PASS - Shows runner number, current base, all options
playwright_test_results.in_play_modal: PASS - Shows Single, Double, Triple, Home Run, outs, other options
playwright_test_results.home_run_clears_bases: PASS - Bases cleared after home run
playwright_test_results.scoreboard_score_update: FAIL - Score stays 0-0 after home run with runners
